data.title: Norske Skog Faces Setback with EU ETS Exclusion
data.description:
Norske Skog ASA ( (DE:0BQ) ) has issued an announcement.

The Norwegian Environment Agency’s decision to exclude Norske Skog’s Skogn and Saugbrugs mills from the EU Emissions Trading System (EU ETS) for 2026-2030 poses significant economic and competitive challenges for the company. This exclusion, based on revised criteria for emissions from sustainable biomass, undermines Norske Skog’s efforts in reducing its carbon footprint and may slow down the green transition, prompting the company to appeal the decision.

More about Norske Skog ASA

Norske Skog ASA operates in the paper industry, focusing on the production of newsprint and magazine paper. The company has positioned itself as a leader in reducing fossil CO₂ emissions through significant investments in sustainable energy solutions and energy efficiency.

YTD Price Performance: -13.24%

Average Trading Volume: 346

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €156.8M

data.title: 4Front Ventures Announces Board Members’ Resignation
data.description:
4Front Ventures ( (TSE:FFNT) ) has provided an update.

data.title: Stantec Acquires Page to Strengthen US Market Position
data.description:
Stantec ( (TSE:STN) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 3, 2025, Stantec announced its acquisition of Page, a US-based architecture and engineering firm, positioning Stantec as the second largest architecture firm in the US. This strategic move enhances Stantec’s service offerings in key growth areas like advanced manufacturing and healthcare, and expands its US employee base to approximately 13,500. The acquisition aligns with Stantec’s 2024-2026 Strategic Plan and aims to strengthen its market presence in North America, leveraging Page’s expertise in cleanroom design and fabrication facilities.

More about Stantec

Stantec is a global leader in sustainable engineering, architecture, and environmental consulting. The company provides expertise in managing infrastructure, demographic changes, and energy transitions. Stantec is known for its innovative approach at the intersection of community, creativity, and client relationships, trading on the TSX and NYSE under the symbol STN.

data.title: Meta Health Limited Extends Deadline for Potential Acquisition of Aios Bio Sciences
data.description:
Meta Health Limited ( (SG:5DX) ) has provided an update.

Meta Health Limited announced an update regarding its ongoing negotiations for the potential acquisition of 30% of Aios Bio Sciences Pte. Ltd. The initial term sheet for this transaction expired on February 2, 2025, but the company and the vendor, Mr. Davin Ng, have mutually agreed to extend the deadline to May 3, 2025, allowing more time for due diligence and negotiations. This extension reflects the company’s strategic interest in evaluating the merits of the acquisition, which could significantly impact its operations and market positioning.

More about Meta Health Limited

Meta Health Limited is a company incorporated in the Republic of Singapore, operating in the healthcare industry. The company is focused on expanding its market presence through strategic acquisitions, such as the potential acquisition of a significant stake in Aios Bio Sciences Pte. Ltd.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: S$7.92M

This announcement is significant for stakeholders as it provides insights into the company’s financial health and operational performance, potentially impacting its market positioning and investor relations.

data.title: VF Appoints Abhishek Dalmia as COO in 2025
data.description:
An update from VF ( (VFC) ) is now available.

V.F. Corporation has appointed Abhishek Dalmia as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, effective April 3, 2025. Mr. Dalmia will oversee corporate strategy, transformation, digital technology, and supply chain operations. His extensive experience includes roles at Boston Consulting Group, lululemon athletica, and Dell Technologies, focusing on digital growth and innovation. This appointment is part of the company’s strategic leadership restructuring, potentially impacting its operational efficiency and market competitiveness.

data.title: Bezant Resources Gains from High-Grade Copper-Gold Discovery at Mankayan
data.description:
Bezant Resources ( (GB:BZT) ) has shared an announcement.

Bezant Resources announced that Blackstone Minerals has released assay results from a previously unreleased drillhole at the Mankayan Copper-Gold Porphyry project, revealing high-grade copper-gold deposits. This development is part of a proposed merger between Blackstone and IDM International, through which Bezant holds its interest in the project. If the merger is completed, Bezant will receive a substantial number of Blackstone shares and options, potentially enhancing its market position and stakeholder value.

More about Bezant Resources

Bezant Resources PLC is a copper-gold exploration and development company. The company focuses on projects like the Mankayan Copper-Gold project in the Philippines, which is strategically located near significant mining operations such as the Lepanto gold mine and Far Southeast project.

data.title: VH Global Energy Reports 2024 Results Amidst Market Challenges
data.description:
VH Global Sustainable Energy Opportunities Plc ( (GB:ENRG) ) has shared an update.

VH Global Sustainable Energy Opportunities Plc reported its annual results for 2024, highlighting a decrease in net asset value due to unfavorable currency exchange rates. Despite this, the company maintained robust operational performance, with significant clean energy contributions and a strong dividend yield. The company has expanded its portfolio with new renewable energy projects in Europe and achieved construction milestones in the UK and Australia. The board is addressing the share price discount to NAV and plans to propose steps to shareholders in 2025 to address this issue, while continuing to focus on operational and financial resilience.

More about VH Global Sustainable Energy Opportunities Plc

VH Global Sustainable Energy Opportunities Plc operates in the renewable energy sector, focusing on investments in clean energy infrastructure. The company is involved in various projects across the globe, including wind, solar, and hydroelectric power, aiming to support the global energy transition and sustainable development goals.

data.title: Sing Holdings Ltd. Announces Board Reconstitution
data.description:
Sing Holdings Ltd. ( (SG:5IC) ) has provided an update.

Sing Holdings Ltd. has announced changes to its Board of Directors, with Mr. Tan Tong Guan retiring as an Independent and Non-Executive Director, and Mr. Choo Eng Chuan being appointed to the same role effective April 26, 2025. Mr. Choo will also serve as Chairman of the Audit Committee and a member of both the Remuneration and Nominating Committees. These changes reflect the company’s ongoing efforts to strengthen its governance and leadership structure, potentially impacting its strategic direction and stakeholder relations.
